prompt: A highly detailed anime-style illustration of a cozy creative studio at golden hour, showing 5 young women gathered around a cluttered wooden worktable, lit by warm sunset light through large windows, hanging pendant lamps, and string lights. The mood is stylish, intelligent, playful, and slightly chaotic, like a startup loft mixed with an artist workspace. In the left foreground, a tall woman with long wavy auburn hair wears a white daisy flower crown and a sleeveless rust-red dress with a belt; she stands closest to camera and holds up a handwritten paper sign that reads exactly: Claude is asking for your permission, with a small heart doodle. Behind and to the right of her stands a second woman with platinum-blonde twin ponytails, a black gothic mini dress, black thigh-high stockings, and large headphones around her neck; she poses confidently with one hand on her hip near an open laptop covered in stickers, prominently featuring a large X logo. In the center background stands a petite girl with very long straight black hair and a dark navy dress, reserved and quiet, positioned in front of a wide monitor displaying a glowing Gemini star logo on a dark screen. To the right of center, a glamorous woman with a short black bob and earrings leans over the desk in a fitted red floral cheongsam-style dress, looking toward the papers and laptops. On the far right, a fifth woman with messy light-brown hair in a loose bun wears an oversized open shirt over a cropped white T-shirt with the OpenAI knot logo and casual pants, leaning over the table with one hand braced on the surface and the other near a drawing tablet. The room should contain 2 laptops visible on the desk, 1 central monitor, 3 mugs, 2 sticky notes, 1 paper sign, 1 notebook page titled "Plans", and many scattered creative objects like pens, cables, books, papers, and cans. The first laptop is covered with stickers including a large X logo; the second laptop has an OpenAI logo. The desk includes a black mug with a moon-and-text design, a white mug that says "Good answer takes time.", a white cup with an orange sunburst logo, an energy-drink can, a clear plastic drink cup, a closed notebook, loose handwritten notes, and a tablet on the far right. One sticky note says "You got this" with a heart, and another says "One step at a time" with a tiny flower. The notebook page on the desk reads "Plans" and lists 3 items: "1. World peace", "2. More coffee", "3. Nap", with a small cat doodle. The environment should include bookshelves, framed prints, potted plants, warm wood textures, and wall decor with visible posters and signs, including "Anthropic", "Kindness intelligence", "DO GOOD BUILD COOL SHIT", and a neon-style sign that says "focus fuel". Use cinematic composition, rich amber and sepia tones, intricate linework, soft painterly shading, detailed fabrics and hair, subtle glow on screens, and a polished modern anime illustration aesthetic. No blur, no distortion, no extra people, and no duplicated objects.
